name_cn:
Chanel Vintage Medium Straw Bag🍂
Size: 20*36*9cm
Grandma 👵 loves the wheat ear 🌾 element, often seen on vintage jewelry 💍. At the 2010 Spring/Summer show, Karl Lagerfeld recreated a farm 👩‍🌾 scene at the Grand Palais. This woven bag 🍃 is from this series. Soft and chewy, feels great, like lying in a barn 🌾 pile 😌. Only a relaxed seaside vacation 🏖️ matches a woven bag. The sea breeze 🌊 in early autumn is cozy and gentle, just like this charming woven bag 👝
